# zenutils-apidoc public API — supported surface (default features)
# (regenerated on every `cargo test` by zenutils-apidoc; ZEN_API_DOC=check verifies, =off skips).
# Encodings: crate-name prefix stripped; auto traits collapse to a
# count + exceptions; trait impls collapse to one roster line per
# type (method signatures live at the trait definition); blanket
# impls omitted; re-export duplicates annotated `[also: path]`.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes with the code.
#
# files: zenutils-apidoc.txt 13 lines (supported surface) | zenutils-apidoc.features.txt 0 added (features: none) | zenutils-apidoc.internal.txt 0 lines (0 hidden + 0 excluded-feature)

## summary
#
#   pub modules                                 1
#   pub types (struct/enum/trait/alias)         1
#   free functions                              1
#   inherent methods                            8
#   trait roster entries (type × trait)         1
#   auto-trait-complete types                   1

#   (root)                           11

## items (11 lines)

pub mod zenutils_apidoc
pub struct ApiDoc
pub fn ApiDoc::crates<I, S>(self, I) -> Self where I: core::iter::traits::collect::IntoIterator<Item = S>, S: core::convert::Into<alloc::string::String>
pub fn ApiDoc::exclude_features<I, S>(self, &str, I) -> Self where I: core::iter::traits::collect::IntoIterator<Item = S>, S: core::convert::Into<alloc::string::String>
pub fn ApiDoc::new() -> Self
pub fn ApiDoc::no_extra_section(self, &str) -> Self
pub fn ApiDoc::out_dir(self, &str) -> Self
pub fn ApiDoc::pinned_features(self, &str, &str) -> Self
pub fn ApiDoc::run(self)
pub fn ApiDoc::workspace_dir(self, &str) -> Self
pub fn run()

## trait impls (1 types)

ApiDoc: Default

## auto traits

1 types implement all of: Freeze, RefUnwindSafe, Send, Sync, Unpin, UnwindSafe
